jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Easyday
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Easyday! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Easyday:
Easyday is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday!
